case_title: PELESANI SUA VS. PROJECT ZEN WELLNESS ET AL

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,297.06 FILED BY SUA, PELESANI AS TO DEFENDANT PROJECT ZEN WELLNESS XU, LE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-03-2021 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SUA, PELESANI RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PROJECT ZEN WELLNESS $3,120.16 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,120.16, THE CASE AGAINST DEFENDANT LE XU IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. THE REMAINING IN THE AMOUNT OF $3120.16 TO THE PLAINTIFF. DEFENDANT IS PROJECT ZEN WELLNESS. PLEASE SEE ATTACHED STATEMENT OF DECISION. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) PLEASE SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT. FILED BY DEFENDANT XU, LE

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-03-2021 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-03-2021 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF PELESANI SUA IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT PROJECT ZEN WELLNESS IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY LE XU (OWNER). DEFENDANT LE XU IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE ISSUES WITH COMPANY. DEFENDANT IS THE AGENT OF SERVICE FOR PROJECT ZEN WELLNESS. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: A. DATT. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT PROJECT ZEN WELLNESS
ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52 AS TO PLAINTIFF SUA, PELESANI

REQUEST PENDING TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (REQUEST FORWARDED TO DEPT 506 FOR JUDICIAL REVIEW & SIGNATURE.) (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF SUA, PELESANI
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-03-2021 - JUDGMENT.
